title: Nightshade District
description: In the city's lower wards, vampires and humans trade blood for money under a fragile treaty, and Riven Marsh runs the cleanest blood-house on the strip. Then a vampire walks in who won't take a paid donor — only her — and her careful neutral world starts to come apart. He says he isn't there to feed. He says he's there to warn her. The treaty is about to break, and she is standing on the fault line.
